description: Full-featured calendar sidebar widget and config panel. Powered by FullCalendar.js. Used by Reminder and other modules for datetime picking.

calendar_locale.description: Date format locale (e.g., 'it' for Italian, 'en-gb' for UK English) for the visual calendar.

calendar_country.description: ISO Country code for public holidays (e.g., 'IT', 'US', 'FR').

day_colors.description: Background colors for days of the week (0=Sun, 1=Mon, ..., 6=Sat).
